response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack and systems engineer with a strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and event-driven architectures, but this role fundamentally requires deep C++ expertise (8–12 years) and the candidate's C++ exposure is marginal — roughly six months at National Instruments and a university thesis project. There is no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443 secure development lifecycle, MQTT, or any of the industrial protocols listed (OPC UA, Modbus, DNP 3.0), making him a poor fit for the core technical and domain requirements of this position.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with event-driven and distributed systems at scale (Sociomantic, GISCollective), which maps loosely to message-broker architectures
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and mentoring others — aligns with behavioral competencies
Broad cross-domain exposure (embedded, mobile, backend, web, IoT-adjacent) showing adaptability and systems thinking
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at National Instruments plus a thesis project) versus the 8–12 years of hands-on C++ required
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or cybersecurity domain knowledge evident anywhere in the resume
No mention of MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, or any industrial protocol; cloud experience is AWS-based, not Azure

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering practices and distributed systems background
